INVOICE_WIZARD.TITLE: New invoice
INVOICE_WIZARD.SUBTITLE: Four-step guided flow. Everything stays in memory until you confirm submission.

INGEST.HEADLINE: Upload PDF
INGEST.DESCRIPTION: Drag or select the document. It stays in memory; nothing is uploaded yet.
INGEST.REQUIRED: A PDF file is required to continue.

EXTRACT.HEADLINE: AI-extracted data
EXTRACT.DESCRIPTION: Review and adjust what the OCR detected. Edits are kept locally.

STATE.READY: Data extracted — please validate and adjust
STATE.FAILED: Extraction failed. You can fill in the data manually.
STATE.AI_HINT: The AI will prefill the fields once the response is received. You can edit them before continuing.

CLASSIFY.HEADLINE: Accounting classification
CLASSIFY.DESCRIPTION: Assign the target asset and consumption type. These technical values are language-independent.
CLASSIFY.TARGET_ENTITY_HINT: Does the invoice affect a Building or a specific Meter?

REVIEW.HEADLINE: Final review
REVIEW.DESCRIPTION: Confirm the data before uploading the document and persisting the invoice.

VIEWER.TITLE: Original document
VIEWER.EMPTY: No PDF has been loaded yet.

ERRORS.MISSING_FILE: The PDF file is gone. Go back to the ingest step.
ERRORS.UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload the document to S3.
ERRORS.FORM_INVALID: Fix the required fields before continuing.

SUCCESS.TITLE: Invoice registered
SUCCESS.BODY: The document was uploaded to S3 and the metadata was stored in the database.
